IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (52979663.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced in union and non-union manufacturing, sales & headquarters environments. Led regional safety operations network across US & Canada, established EHS networks for multiple sites, expanded skill set to include ISO audits.
SKILLS: Safety Management, Employee Engagement, HR Generalist, Training & Development, Organization, Recruiting & Succession Planning, ISO 22000 Quality Auditor, ISO 14001 Environmental Auditor, Crisis Management, Performance Management, Contract Negotiations, Case Management, ADA Compliance, FMLA Implementation, Kaizen, Quality Leadership Training

JOB TITLE: Industrial Development Director

DESCRIPTION: Developed technical training for 7 manufacturing sites.

SOURCE: 52979663.pdf
JOB TITLE: Environmental, Health & Safety Director
COMPANY: Dannon - Minster, OH
DATES: October 2010 - October 2015
DESCRIPTION: Led regional safety and health network for 4 Dannon US sites. Expanded responsibilities to include safety auditing across multiple divisions.

SOURCE: 52979663.pdf
JOB TITLE: Human Resource Manager
COMPANY: Ingersoll-Rand ARO Fluid Products Division - Angola, IN
DATES: July 1996 - December 1999
DESCRIPTION: Managed HR functions including safety and training. Reduced absenteeism from 4% to 1.5%. Closed 114 grievances without arbitration.

DESCRIPTION: Led HR/Training functions. Closed a facility and defeated union organizing campaign.
